  1. Home
  2. Modern CSS
  3. View transitions

Modern CSS

View transitions

View transitions provide smoother navigation and interface state changes with progressive enhancement.

Architecture impact

  • supports progressive enhancement
  • reduces JavaScript animation complexity
  • improves navigation continuity
  • requires accessibility consideration

LSCSS

Layered Semantic CSS. A practical methodology for calm, maintainable front-end architecture.

Evolves with real delivery. Change what does not fit your codebase.
